name: shadowzdex-subgraph
description: ShadowzDex IntentRouter subgraph — volume, fees, unique users for analytics + DEX listings

scripts.deploy:arb: graph build subgraph.yaml && goldsky subgraph deploy shadowzdex-arb/v0.2.0 --path build
scripts.deploy:base: graph build subgraph.base.yaml && goldsky subgraph deploy shadowzdex-base/v0.2.0 --path build
scripts.deploy:polygon: graph build subgraph.polygon.yaml && goldsky subgraph deploy shadowzdex-polygon/v0.1.0 --path build
scripts.tag:arb: goldsky subgraph tag create shadowzdex-arb/v0.2.0 --tag latest
scripts.tag:base: goldsky subgraph tag create shadowzdex-base/v0.2.0 --tag latest
scripts.tag:polygon: goldsky subgraph tag create shadowzdex-polygon/v0.1.0 --tag latest
